proposal_overview_sections.heading: Understanding of Requirements
proposal_overview_sections.reason: These criteria require the supplier to demonstrate their understanding of the RFQ and SOW documentation and associated requirements.

proposal_overview_sections.heading: Solution Overview
proposal_overview_sections.reason: This criterion requires a description of the proposed approach or strategy to performing the Services.

proposal_overview_sections.heading: Service Delivery Approach
proposal_overview_sections.reason: These criteria involve the supplier's approach to service delivery and ensuring compliance with the Commonwealth's objectives.

proposal_overview_sections.heading: Governance / Management Approach
proposal_overview_sections.reason: These criteria involve the supplier's management and governance approach, including attending meetings and providing reports.

proposal_overview_sections.heading: Risk / Quality / Assurance Approach
proposal_overview_sections.reason: These criteria involve compliance with standards and ensuring quality and risk management.

proposal_overview_sections.heading: Innovation / Value-Add
proposal_overview_sections.reason: This criterion involves the supplier's ability to provide innovative solutions and value-add to the Commonwealth.

covered_elsewhere.reason: These criteria involve pricing information and should be covered in the pricing workbook or quote.
These criteria involve providing CVs of key personnel and should be covered in the CVs or key personnel attachments.
These criteria involve the AIC Plan and should be covered in the AIC plan document.
This criterion involves past performance and should be covered in the past performance document.
These criteria involve completing returnable schedules and should be covered in the returnable schedules.

overall_summary: The Proposal Overview document should focus on narrative sections that demonstrate the supplier's understanding, solution, service delivery, governance, risk management, and innovation. Pricing, past performance, AIC plans, and CVs should be addressed in their respective documents.
